title: Infosys launches AI-first GCC model for Global Capability Centers
detailed_summary: Infosys unveiled its AI-First GCC Model, a specialized offering intended to accelerate the setup and transformation of Global Capability Centers into AI-powered innovation hubs. The offering combines Infosys Agentic Foundry, EdgeVerve AI Next, and Infosys Topaz™ to embed production-grade agentic AI across GCC operations from setup to scale. Infosys said the model builds on over 100 engagements with local GCC entities across industries, including GCC work for Lufthansa Systems, zooplus, and Danske Bank. The offering covers GCC lifecycle management, AI-led transformation, talent strategies, operational readiness, and operating models such as Build-Operate-Transfer, assisted GCC builds, joint ventures, and partner-hosted models.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in nextgeneration digital services and consulting, today unveiled its AI-First GCC Model, a specialized offering that accelerates the setup and transformation of Global Capability Centers (GCCs) into AI-powered hubs for innovation and growth.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Unveils AI-first GCC Model to Transform Global Capability Centers into Innovation Hubs

important_text_spans.text: Building on its proven track-record of over 100 engagements with local GCC entities across industries, including setting up and managing GCCs for enterprises such as Lufthansa Systems, zooplus, and Danske Bank
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Unveils AI-first GCC Model to Transform Global Capability Centers into Innovation Hubs
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the scale of Infosys's existing GCC experience.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys' new GCC model brings together Infosys Agentic Foundry for building and scaling reliable production-grade AI agents, EdgeVerve AI Next as the unified platform to run applied and agentic AI at enterprise scale, and Infosys Topaz™
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Unveils AI-first GCC Model to Transform Global Capability Centers into Innovation Hubs
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the core Infosys platforms used in the offering.
